nasb.text: For you are not being sent to a people of unintelligible speech or difficult language, but to the house of Israel,

esv.text: For you are not sent to a people of foreign speech and a hard language, but to the house of Israel—

cnv.text: 你受差派不是到一個說話難明、言語難懂的民族那裡去，而是到以色列家去；

ccb.text: 你不是奉命去语言不通的民族那里，而是到以色列人当中。
